## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX teams to discuss performance, content strategy, and upcoming changes.](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [API directory pages are performing well, with new additions like Kelsey and Bitbucket showing strong traffic](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Team is shifting focus towards Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) alongside SEO, with plans to increase transactional content to 50%](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [GrowthX team structure is changing, with Carrie taking over account management in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [CTA optimization needed as current inline CTAs are underperforming](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update

  - [API directory pages showing strong performance](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [New additions like Kelsey and Bitbucket quickly gaining traffic](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Team to prioritize refreshing top 20 API pages](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Content Refresh Project

  - [Adrian to send topics for content refresh today](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Team aims to start generating refreshed content next week](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Design updates may follow content generation](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

### Dev.to Indexing

  - [Adrian archived dev.to posts for non-indexed Zuplo pages](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Changed syndication timing from 2 weeks to 1 month post-publication](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Team to manually request indexing for important pages (10/day limit)](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

### New Performance Dashboard

  - [Dave building new dashboard with LLM filters](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Will provide insights on LLM traffic sources and performance](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### Team Structure Changes

  - [Carrie taking over account management in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Jenn to shadow and support during transition, especially for GitHub processes](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Dave remains head of pod, team aims to include him in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)

### AEO Focus

  - [Board feedback suggests increasing importance of AEO](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Team to shift towards 50% transactional queries in content](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Adrian to evaluate performance using tools like TouchApt and Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Discussion on potential strategies to increase brand mentions across web](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

### CTA Optimization

  - [Current inline CTAs underperforming (less than 5 clicks in 30 days)](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Team to consider rewording CTAs, adding more contextual options](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Potential redesign to make CTAs more visually distinct](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

### URL Structure

  - [Proposal to remove dates from blog URLs for evergreen content](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Team decides to delay implementation until current indexing issues stabilize](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adrian to send topics for content refresh today](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

  - [Jenn to coordinate with Dave for rescheduling meeting time to include him](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring dev.to indexing situation](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Adrian to review CTA design and wording options](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Delay URL structure changes until indexing stabilizes](https://fathom.video/share/XsHKSq219-pcy4je61iCftqrdB6YAFxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
